interfaceLanguageDescription: Controls app UI, menus, and messages. It never rewrites the current Markdown document.
themeDescription: Syncs to the main window and render services after saving.
editorModeDefaultDescription: Used as the default editing mode the next time a document opens.
autoSaveDescription: Automatically writes edits to the current local file.
unsavedChangesCloseWindow: These files have unsaved changes: {names}. Closing the window will discard them. Continue?
unsavedChangesExitApp: These files have unsaved changes: {names}. Quitting the app will discard them. Continue?
unsavedChangesCloseTabs: These files have unsaved changes: {names}. Closing will discard them. Continue?
closeToTrayFirstPrompt:
When closing the main window for the first time, hide Nomo to the system tray?

OK: hide to tray and remember this choice.
Cancel: close the window directly. You can enable this later in Preferences.
closeWindowBehaviorDescription: Choose what the close button does to the main window.
closeWindowChoiceMessage: Choose what happens to the main window.
folderMissing: The folder does not exist or has been moved
fileMissing: The file does not exist or has been moved
largeDocumentReadonly: The current document switched to read-only source mode because it exceeds the large-file threshold
readonlyCannotEditLink: The current document is read-only, so links cannot be edited
switchSemanticBeforeEditLink: Switch to semantic mode before editing links
linkHrefInvalid: The link address is unavailable. Use http(s), mailto, an anchor, or a relative path.
linkNothingToRemove: The current selection has no link to remove
readonlyCannotEditMetadata: The current document is read-only, so metadata cannot be edited
readonlyCannotDeleteMetadata: The current document is read-only, so metadata cannot be deleted
documentHasNoHeadings: This document has no headings yet
rememberFolderOpenChoice: Do not ask again, and remember my choice
